_comments.tenantId: Azure AD Tenant ID. If specified, ensures connection to correct tenant. Leave empty to skip tenant validation.
_comments.managementGroupId: The Management Group ID where policy initiatives will be assigned.
_comments.eventHubSubscriptionId: Subscription ID where Event Hub Namespaces are located (or will be created).
_comments.eventHubResourceGroup: Resource Group for Event Hub Namespaces.
_comments.eventHubSku: Event Hub SKU for new namespaces: Basic, Standard, or Premium.
_comments.eventHubCapacity: Throughput units for Standard (1-20) or Processing units for Premium (1-10).
_comments.useExistingNamespaces: Set to true to use pre-existing Event Hub Namespaces instead of creating new ones.
_comments.centralizedRegion: For CENTRALIZED mode: The region where the single namespace is located.
_comments.centralizedNamespace: For CENTRALIZED mode with useExistingNamespaces=true: Name of existing namespace.
_comments.diagnosticSettingName: Unique name for diagnostic settings created by this solution. Used by cleanup function and avoids conflicts with other Azure Policies. Default: setbycriblpolicy
_comments.multiRegionNote: For MULTI-REGION mode: Run Inventory first to discover regions. Results are saved to region-inventory/inventory-latest.json
